node.text: That’s why I live in Kyoto 😍😍😍
As a japanese, abt #9, cant recomment u learning how to make them cz I think they r raw eggs and raw eggs in foreign countries r like, yeah

I’m still dreaming about this food.. any recommendations for when I go back?? 

#pilot #japan #foodie #tokyo #kyoto
As a japanese, abt #9, cant recomment u learning how to make them cz I think they r raw eggs and raw eggs in foreign countries r like, yeah
That’s why I live in Kyoto 😍😍😍
Those are my favorite flavor of onigiri too! A good way to approximate that - get a warm bowl of rice and add a raw egg and soy sauce. Makes a filling breakfast!
Food in Japan is next level!
Love that scarf! I got it in pink and black ! Thanks again !
#9 is an onigiri. They put different things in them and sell them at Japanese markets in the US if you have one around.
